title: centaurea orthoacantha
intro: Centaurea orthoacantha, also known as the Centaury or Orthoacantha, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve flatulence, and act as an expectorant to help relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Centaurea orthoacantha include its use in treating digestive disorders, such as indigestion and constipation, as well as its potential anti-inflammatory properties. Centaury is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional due to potential interactions with other medications.
